title: SPLASH PADS - 211info
text: FIR GROVE SPLASH PAD SPLASH PADS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Available to the public as a way to cool off when temperatures are dangerously warm. Offers a water splash pad, open air shade, and park spaces. 1654 W Harvard Avenue Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 10am-Dusk through September 1, 2025. Email (541) 492-6730 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 492-6730 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None AREA SERVED: Douglas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located just off Harvard Avenue behind the Umpqua Valley Arts Center Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
